long_context.label: 128K
long_context.error: bench script 600s timeout — actual prefill alone ~1500s at observed ~75 tok/s rate

notes: Post-patch013 + post-patch014 with turboquant KV. **Numbers are dramatically lower than the 2026-04-14 fp8 baseline (results.json: 14.3 tok/s @128) because the 4-14 run pre-dates patch 013 — DeltaNet cache wiring was broken, so the layers were skipping recurrent computation and emitting fluent garbage at high speed.** Patch 013 fixed correctness (MMLU 16.7→93%); now all 24 DeltaNet + 8 standard-attn layers actually compute → ~30x slower at 64K. This bench is the first apples-to-apples LONG-CONTEXT measurement on a CORRECT Qwen3.5-27B inference path. 128K+ tests need a longer per-request timeout in the bench script (600s default isn't enough at this throughput); next iteration will rerun with --timeout.
compared_to_qwen36: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (db317e9) hit 0.9 tok/s @64K — Qwen3.5-27B at 0.2 tok/s @64K is 4x slower despite being smaller. Same DeltaNet-hybrid arch but Qwen3.6 is MoE (only 3B active params per token), Qwen3.5 is dense, so dense weight reads dominate at long context. README perf table updated to reflect this.
